name: PaperTodo

descFull: 极简 Windows 桌面便签工具。让桌面上有几张安静、可用、不会打扰人的纸。WPF 原生，支持待办与 Markdown。——A minimalist Windows desktop sticky note tool. It puts a few quiet, usable, and unobtrusive sheets of paper on your desktop. Native WPF, with support for to-dos and Markdown.
